src: A cluster of bright orange clementines with smooth, dimpled texture, nestled together. Their shiny skins catch the light, highlighting the grid pattern of the netting wrapping them.
edit: A lively Pixar-style kitchen scene with bright onions in mesh, shiny wooden bowls, cheerful tangerines, cartoonish pitcher and a rolling pin, bright fruit, and playful blue oven mitts. Cartoonish scattered kitchen appliances are in the background.
